privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Sepsis protocol text constructed via odfpy in setup_task.sh. The expected formatting parameters (title, main sections, alert snippets, and body alignment prefixes) exactly match the generated text content. The expected minimum indent of 0.4 inches acts as a tolerance bound for the 0.5 inch requirement from the style guide. Additionally, the task is defective because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
